title: Legacy-Recon Coverage Ledger
description: Feature inventory + coverage state for engineer-legacy-recon static inference. Seeded from the pasted navigation tree (Phase 1), filled during per-page extraction (Phase 2), resumable across sessions, the single source of truth for full-feature coverage. Observation source is user-provided material ONLY — never a live site.

system_name.description: 遗留系统名称 / legacy system name (e.g. 无人机合格证管理系统)

ends.description: 识别出的端 / ends identified (e.g. 管理端, 机构端)

roles.description: 识别出的角色 / roles identified (e.g. superadmin, 机构管理员)

material_forms.description: 用户提供的材料形态 / forms of material the user provided

browsed_live.description: 本技能恒为 false：只读既有材料，绝不联网 / always false — static material only, never live

dry_rounds.description: 连续无新增要素的轮数 / consecutive rounds with no new elements

pass_count.description: 已完成的提取轮数 / extraction passes completed

complete.description: loop-until-dry 是否收敛 / whether extraction converged

features.description: 功能账本条目——每个导航叶子一个 / feature ledger entries, one per nav leaf

nav_path.description: 端 + 菜单路径作主键，区分多端重名 / end + menu path (e.g. 管理端/合格证管理/合格证列表)

roles_visible.description: 可见此页的角色 / roles that can see this page

entity_fields.description: 从表头/表单推断的字段 / fields inferred from columns/forms

filters.description: 筛选/查询维度与枚举取值 / filter dimensions and enum values

actions.description: 按钮/操作动词 / buttons and action verbs

states.description: 标签页揭示的状态集 / states revealed by tabs

aggregates.description: 统计头/汇总指标 / stat headers and summary metrics

material_ref.description: .agents/recon.material/ 下对应材料的引用 / reference to the archived material for this page

extraction_status.description: seeded=从导航树种下未提取, partial=部分提取待复查, extracted=已抽干, no_material=无对应材料(进缺口清单)

gaps.description: 缺口清单——材料缺失的关键信息，供 RECON-FIDELITY.md 与用户追问 / gap list feeding RECON-FIDELITY.md and user follow-up

question.description: 要向用户追问的具体问题 / concrete question to ask the user
